localizedContent.title: Import entity JSON
localizedContent.subtitle: Choose an existing entity, then apply a partial or complete JSON payload to the supported fields.

selection.title: 1. Select the target
selection.description: Selection uses readable search results so you do not update an entity from a technical ID alone.
selection.empty: Run a search to display available targets.

editor.title: 2. Paste JSON
editor.description: The JSON is validated by the API and applied through the Application layer.

help.title: Accepted format
help.merge: By default, provided languages are merged with existing values: other languages are preserved.
help.replace: Add "replaceExisting": true or "mode": "replace" to fully replace the localized field.
help.fields: Supported fields: descriptions, names, description, biography, altTexts, captions, credits, labels depending on the selected type.
help.accessConditions: For an attraction park item, accessConditions can create or update conditions: type, implicit customTypeKey for an unknown type, value, unit, requiresAccompaniment, minimumCompanionAge, displayOrder, label and description.

entityHints.parkItem: Localized item description, with access conditions for attractions.
entityHints.image: Localized alternative texts, captions and credits.
entityHints.accessConditionType: Reusable catalogue of access condition types.
